pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.8 to 3.0.0 to align with Java 17 baseline and modern Spring ecosystem.
Update the managed Java version property from 11 to 17 to enforce JDK 17 compilation.
Rename the project artifact ID from schematic-boot-2 to schematic to reflect the new versioning scheme.
Reset the project version to 0.0.1-SNAPSHOT for the new major release cycle.
Introduce Testcontainers BOM to manage versions for test container dependencies.
Remove Bootstrap WebJar dependency as part of frontend stack cleanup or migration.
Remove Font Awesome WebJar dependency as part of frontend stack cleanup.
Remove Popper.js WebJar dependency as part of frontend stack cleanup.
Remove HTMX WebJar dependency as part of frontend stack cleanup.
Remove WebJars Locator Core dependency as it is no longer needed without WebJars.
Remove Thymeleaf Layout Dialect dependency, likely replacing it with native Thymeleaf features or other templating strategies.
Remove HTMX Spring Boot Thymeleaf integration library.
Remove Spring Boot Configuration Processor dependency.
Add Project Lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code.
Remove H2 in-memory database dependency, likely in favor of Testcontainers for integration tests.
Add Testcontainers JUnit Jupiter integration for containerized testing.
Add Testcontainers PostgreSQL module for integration testing with a real database.
Remove JReleaser Maven plugin and its configuration, simplifying the build process.
Add Spring Boot Maven plugin to handle repackaging and Lombok exclusion.
Remove the release profile containing javadoc and source plugin configurations.

.gitignore.general_idea: Remove a custom gitignore entry for a temporary pom file that is no longer needed.
.gitignore.human_impl: Removed lines '-### just use ###' and '-/.pom.xml.temp' from .gitignore

README.md.general_idea: Replace the detailed README content with a single-line description to declutter the repository documentation.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced full markdown content with 'Database management UI for Spring Boot'
